changeOrdersNote: Real-value model (2026-07-15): real service-line values (Electric Service Equipment $466,800 + Installation $231,900, both retainage-EXEMPT). Per-item %s carried from Req 12 (~99.46%, NOT 100%) computed so earned-less-retainage through Req 12 = $1,591,265 (calculated; see pushRealValueModel.mjs which scales the snapshot %s + one fine-tune line). Levi edits real per-line %s in the in-app SOV editor.

g702.source: Calculated from SOV chain + per-line retainage. Earned-less-retainage through Req 12 = $1,591,265 falls out of the exempt base ($612,650 = Electric Service Equipment, retainage-exempt) → retainage $108,735 on $1,087,350 → $1,700,000 - $108,735 = $1,591,265. No pinned/hardcoded figure.
